prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2023年（理科）最低位次约27256→27668→28521，呈逐年后移趋势；2024年贵州高考改革后（物理类）位次跳升至45483，2025年略回升至43592，近两年位 次在4.3–4.5万区间波动，2025年基准约43592名；2021–2023年本省计划40–41人，2024年扩至54人，2025年增至56人；2026年计划56人，与2025年持平， 无扩招稀释效应，竞争压力未因计划变化而缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年有所波动（2021年第180→2022年第182→2024年第173→2025 年第198），2026年未进入前200名，排名呈下滑趋势，对高分考生吸引力略有减弱；近年声誉平稳，未出现明显负面舆情或投档断档事件；抖音热度排名第106 位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量较低，社会关注度处于同类院校中等偏下水平；第五轮学科评估中未进入A-及以上等级，暂无A类学科，学科竞争力在211高校 中相对偏弱，对顶尖考生的吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、临床医学、电气工程等热门专业社会热度持续偏高；生化环材、土木建筑等传统工科明显劝退。本省 2026年普通高考总人数约29.9万，较2025年物理类考生约20.7万有所增加，竞争加剧；省控线（物理类本科批）2024年380分→2025年387分，略有上升，反映整体竞争强度提升。\ n青海大学位于青海省，距贵州省较远，属于跨省招生；该校在贵州招生占比约2%–3%（2025年贵州招生约56人），非本地生源主力市场，地域偏好因素对报考热度 影响中性偏弱。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年招生计划与2025年持平、本省考生规模增加及软科排名下滑等因素，在2025年基准43592名基础上预计竞争略有 加剧，位次小幅后移；预测最低位次约44000名，区间43500–44500名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间43500–44500名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业作为冲刺、三档专业作为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如43000名以内）可重点冲刺临床医学、口腔 医学等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（如44500名左右）应以三档保底专业为主，谨慎选择一档专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2023 (Science), the minimum ranking was approximately 27256 → 27668 → 28521, showing a trend of moving backward year by year; after the 2024 Guizhou college entrance examination reform (Physics Category), the ranking jumped to 45483, slightly recovered to 43592 in 2025, fluctuating in the range of 43,000–45,000 in recent two years, with a baseline of about 43592 in 2025; from 2021 to 2023, the provincial enrollment plan was 40–41 people, expanded to 54 in 2024, and increased to 56 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 56 people, unchanged from 2025, with no dilution effect from expansion, and competitive pressure has not eased due to plan changes.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science China University Rankings have fluctuated in recent years (180th in 2021 → 182nd in 2022 → 173rd in 2024 → 198th in 2025), and in 2026 it did not enter the top 200, showing a declining trend, slightly weakening its appeal to high-scoring students; its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative incidents or enrollment gaps; Douyin popularity ranking is 106th, rated as 'average', with low short video exposure, and social attention is at a medium-to-low level among similar universities; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it did not achieve A- or above, with no A-level disciplines, and its disciplinary competitiveness is relatively weak among 211 universities, limiting its appeal to top students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Clinical Medicine, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity; traditional engineering fields like Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials, Civil Engineering, and Architecture are clearly discouraged. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in this province is about 299,000, an increase from about 207,000 Physics Category candidates in 2025, intensifying competition; the provincial control line (Physics Category undergraduate batch) rose from 380 in 2024 to 387 in 2025, reflecting an overall increase in competition intensity.\ nQinghai University is located in Qinghai Province, far from Guizhou Province, and is a cross-provincial enrollment; its enrollment in Guizhou accounts for about 2%–3% (about 56 students in Guizhou in 2025), not the main source of local students, and the influence of regional preference on application popularity is neutral to weak.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical trend of ranking decline, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, the increase in the number of provincial candidates, and the decline in Soft Science ranking, competition is expected to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 43592, with a slight backward shift in ranking; the predicted minimum ranking is about 44000, with a range of 43500–44500.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 43500–44500, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 43000), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors like Clinical Medicine and Stomatology; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 44500), you should mainly choose Tier 3 safety majors and be cautious with Tier 1 majors.
